auth_notes: Requires an API Key generated from the Personal.ai desktop application or web dashboard settings. The key is passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
rate_limits: Standard rate limits apply but are not explicitly documented in public docs; typically accommodates standard automation frequencies.
gotchas: The API is primarily designed for 'Memory' ingestion; real-time conversational triggers are limited.
Data must be formatted correctly as 'Text' or 'Link' types for the memory stack to process it effectively.
Lack of outbound webhooks means polling is required to check for updates if not initiated by the workflow.
research_notes: Integration is straightforward via the HTTP Request node. Use POST requests to the /memory or /message endpoints. Authentication is handled via a standard Header (Authorization: Bearer [API_KEY]). The API uses JSON bodies for all data transmission.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration is straightforward via the HTTP Request node. Use POST requests to the /memory or /message endpoints. Authentication is handled via a standard Header (Authorization: Bearer [API_KEY]). The API uses JSON bodies for all data transmission.
